claim_blocked_reason: V62 is a same-target repair probe; broad claims require V63/V64 expansion/regression.

controls.reason: V62 must rerun the exact V61 target list in the same order.
V62 does not manually curate or replace targets.
V62 N must be exactly 100.
E60 baseline must match the frozen V61 saturation shock.
V62 runs the E61 engine line.
No engine mutation occurs inside the E61 rerun.
V62 is labeled as a same-target repair probe, not a broad discovery claim.
E61 context words are exposed for V61 cofactor, oligomer, and membrane missing-context failures.
The V61 30% cluster representative property is preserved.
Every V62 packet is sealed before holdout.
Every holdout references the sealed prediction hash.
Forced wrong grammars are rejected or routed to abstention.
Composition-preserving shuffled controls are generated with target metadata and repair marks withheld.
Coordinate-derived source blocks prediction.
AlphaFold-like model blocks prediction.
Holdout validation cannot initialize prediction before sealing.
Internal runtime cannot become biological evidence.
Random sequence without evidence abstains.
Every target has an explicit V62 score row.
Regression tests for V50-V61 are run outside the batch artifact and reported with the commit.
README is manual-owned and must remain untouched.

forbidden_claims: E61 has saturated broad RCSB protein space.
Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, or native topology were used before sealing.

missing_esperanto_candidates.missing_esperanto_rule: IDR persistence and fold-upon-binding separation word
